Package nonprofitbookkeeping.plugins.scaledger

Class SCALedgerPlugin

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.plugins.scaledger.SCALedgerPlugin
All Implemented Interfaces:
Plugin
public class SCALedgerPlugin extends Object implements Plugin
Plugin for handling SCA Ledger functionalities. This plugin provides UI elements and actions to load, process, and save SCA ledger data from XLSM and JSON formats. It manages its own state for SCA-specific beans and the currently active SCA file, replacing previous static access patterns.

  • Method Details

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Gets the name of the plugin. This name may be displayed in the UI or used for identification.
      Specified by:
      getName in interface Plugin
      Returns:
      The name of this plugin: "SCA Ledger Tools".

    • getDescription

      public String getDescription()
      Gets a brief description of what the plugin does. This description can be used in a plugin manager UI or for help purposes.
      Specified by:
      getDescription in interface Plugin
      Returns:
      A description of the plugin's purpose, focusing on SCA ledger processing.

    • initialize

      public void initialize(ApplicationContext context) throws Exception
      Initializes the plugin with the application context. This method is called once when the plugin is loaded by the application. Plugins can use the application context to access core application services and UI components like the primary stage. Initializes the plugin by storing the application context and preparing internal components like the PageViewerPanel.
      Specified by:
      initialize in interface Plugin
      Parameters:
      context - The application context provided by the main application.
      Throws:
      Exception - If any error occurs during initialization (not thrown by this implementation).

    • addMenuItems

      public void addMenuItems(javafx.scene.control.MenuBar mainMenuBar)
      Allows the plugin to add custom menu items to the application's main menu bar. This method is called after Plugin.initialize(ApplicationContext) and provides the plugin with a reference to the main MenuBar. Adds a new "SCA Ledger" top-level menu to the application's main menu bar. This menu includes items for loading XLSM tables, importing JSON, saving modified copies, generic file input/output actions (contextualized for SCA), and an undo edit action. Actions are instantiated and linked to their respective menu items.
      Specified by:
      addMenuItems in interface Plugin
      Parameters:
      mainMenuBar - The main menu bar of the application.

    • shutdown

      public void shutdown()
      Override @see nonprofitbookkeeping.plugin.Plugin#shutdown()
      Specified by:
      shutdown in interface Plugin

    • getScaBeans

      public Map<String,Object> getScaBeans()
      Gets the map of SCA-specific beans (objects) managed by this plugin. This replaces the static `BeanShell.beans`.
      Returns:
      The map of SCA beans.

    • setScaBeans

      public void setScaBeans(Map<String,Object> scaBeans)
      Sets the map of SCA-specific beans for this plugin.
      Parameters:
      scaBeans - The map of SCA beans to set.

    • getCurrentScaFile

      public File getCurrentScaFile()
      Gets the currently active SCA file being processed by this plugin. This replaces the static `NonCompanyFile.currentFile`.
      Returns:
      The current SCA File, or null if none is active.

    • setCurrentScaFile

      public void setCurrentScaFile(File currentScaFile)
      Sets the currently active SCA file for this plugin.
      Parameters:
      currentScaFile - The SCA File to set as current.

    • getPageViewerPanel

      public PageViewerPanel getPageViewerPanel()
      Gets the PageViewerPanel instance associated with this plugin. This panel is used for displaying SCA ledger pages.
      Returns:
      The PageViewerPanel instance.
